name: Surfer SEO Content Optimization API
what_it_does: Data-driven SEO content platform with REST API — analyzing SERPs for target keywords, generating content guidelines (word count, NLP terms, headings, images), scoring content against competitors in real-time, providing AI writing assistance, and offering keyword research with topical clusters.
use_cases: Generating SEO content briefs for target keywords programmatically via API
Querying content score for published articles and tracking optimization progress
Integrating Surfer content score into CMS for real-time editor feedback
Pulling keyword cluster data for content calendar planning automation
Syncing Surfer audit results with project management tools for content teams
not_for: Technical SEO and site audit (use Screaming Frog for crawls)
Backlink analysis and link building campaigns
Pure rank tracking without content optimization
best_when: A content marketing team wants data-driven SEO briefs and real-time content scoring that competes against top-ranking pages, with AI writing assistance built in.
avoid_when: You need backlink data, technical SEO auditing, or only rank tracking without content optimization.

auth.notes: API key from Surfer account settings. Bearer token auth. Account-level access. No OAuth2 or scopes. No webhooks — polling for async content analysis. API access may require specific plan tier.

pricing.paid_tiers: Essential $89/month; Scale $129/month; Scale AI $219/month; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Polish company (Wroclaw). Founded 2017. Raised $7M. 150,000+ users. Real-time Content Editor scores content as you type. AI outline generator and article writer. Keyword Research with topical maps. Audit feature for existing content. Strong in content-first SEO teams and agencies.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for content editor, SERP analyzer, and keyword research. Bearer token auth. Limited public documentation — primarily for integration partners. Content analysis is async. Content score computation requires wait time. Polling required for analysis completion.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Content document reads idempotent. SERP analysis results idempotent by keyword and date. New analysis requests create new records — check for recent existing analysis.
known_agent_gotchas: API documentation is limited — contact Surfer support for partner API access details
SERP analysis consumes query credits — verify no recent analysis before creating new
Content scoring is SERP-based — results vary by day as SERPs change
No webhooks — implement polling for analysis completion
Location-specific analysis — specify country code for localized SERP data

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. EU and US data residency. Bearer token auth. Polish company with EU data protection focus. SEO content data has low PII sensitivity. API key securely stored — no user personal data in requests.
